docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CBSJ FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT TREJO, ROGELIO DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-12-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-11-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-15-2002
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAR-12-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-22-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). OSC TO PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY, PHILLIP J. GRIEGO. THE APR-12-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CBSJ FINANCIAL CORP. SERVED MAR-22-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TREJO, ROGELIO

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-22-2002 CONTINUED TO JUL-03-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). MAY-22-2002 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORIGINAL SUMMONS RETURNED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CBSJ FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT TREJO, ROGELIO
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $141.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT TREJO, ROGELIO

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TREJO, ROGELIO $945.21 PRINCIPAL, $236.30 ATTORNEY FEES, $199.14 INTEREST, $141.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,521.65, TOTAL $ 1,521.65 SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CBSJ FINANCIAL CORP.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-03-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,000.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $9.75 INTEREST, $26.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CBSJ FINANCIAL CORP.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TREJO, ROGELIO
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CBSJ FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT TREJO, ROGELIO
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT TREJO, ROGELIO
